headline: Bitcoin Bulls Falter: 6-Week Low for Key Metric

article.title: Key Bitcoin price metric used by bulls falls to six-week low, but there’s a silver lining
article.summary: Profit-taking by Bitcoin traders pushed the Coinbase BTC premium to a six-week low, but demand from longer-term traders put a clear support under the range lows.

headline: Missouri Sues CoinFlip Over $1.8M Crypto Fraud

article.title: Missouri AG sues crypto ATM operator CoinFlip ‘for enabling scams’
article.summary: The lawsuit followed the launch of a December 2025 investigation by Missouri authorities into several crypto ATM companies, citing “deceptive fee structures” and scams.

headline: Asia Stocks Surge 2% on Tech Rebound

article.title: Asian Stocks Climb as Tech Rallies, Nvidia Slips: Markets Wrap
article.summary: Asian equities rose for the first time in five days as investors returned to the artificial intelligence trade, while a clutch of tech IPOs kept enthusiasm for the sector elevated.

headline: Australia's 3.7% Jobless Rate Cuts Rate-Hike Odds

article.title: Australia’s Surprising Jump in Unemployment Trims Rate-Hike Bets
article.summary: Australia’s unemployment rate unexpectedly climbed in April, suggesting the labor market is beginning to cool in response to rising interest rates and an energy shockwave from the Middle East conflict.

headline: Nakamoto Plans 1:40 Split After 99% Bitcoin Plunge

article.title: Bitcoin Firm Nakamoto Plots 1-for-40 Stock Split Following 99% Price Plunge
article.summary: Bitcoin treasury company Nakamoto aims to massively reduce its share count as it seeks a price of at least $1 to regain Nasdaq compliance.

headline: $100M Crypto Exposed to Shai-Hulud Malware Threat

article.title: Shai-Hulud: What to Know About the Malware Spreading Through Software Pipelines

headline: SpaceX Holds $1.45B Bitcoin Amid IPO Plans

article.title: Elon Musk’s SpaceX holds $1.45 billion worth of bitcoin as firm looks to go public
article.summary: A stockpile of over 18,000 would make Elon Musk's SpaceX the seventh-largest Bitcoin holder, ahead of Coinbase.

headline: Bitcoin Plunges 10% Amid Extreme Bearish Sentiment

article.summary: Bitcoin’s recent rally hit resistance at the 200-day MA near $82,400, a pattern CryptoQuant said is similar to the March 2022 bear market.
